violations.text: Observed insect control device stored above food prep area in the juice prep area. Insect control devices shall be installed so that the devices are not located over a FOOD preparation area. Establishment shall relocate the insect control device to a different location, away from food prep areas. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking adequate labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2024
The establishment could not supply inspector with written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 10 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice and took ice machine out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Deli meat and parfaits were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Chlorine, WD40, and spray bottles with chemical were stored with food, equipment, utensils, and/or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

Parfait packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC moved parfaits out of self service unit until labels are created. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The plugs/stoppers for the three comparment sink were in improper adjustment (did not provide a correrct seal and allowed water to drain). New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
